lead.titleZh: 个体化游泳教育项目对慢性腰痛的 RCT 疗效：与 APTA 支付倡导并列最高分
lead.titleEn: Individualized swimming and education RCT for chronic low back pain: Tied for top score with APTA payment advocacy
lead.paragraphZh: 今日共有 31 篇文章，涵盖 6 个专科，主要关注骨科与肌骨、神经康复。本期有两项获得最高分：一项 RCT 显示个体化游泳和教育项目对慢性腰痛有效，另一项则是 APTA 成员为推动支付倡导而团结的新闻。骨科与肌骨领域有 3 篇系统综述值得关注，涉及剖宫产瘢痕、骶髂关节功能障碍及膝关节置换术后肿胀。
lead.paragraphEn: Today's 31 articles span 6 specialties, with a focus on orthopedic/musculoskeletal and neurorehabilitation. Two items received the top score: an RCT demonstrating the effectiveness of an individualized swimming and education program for chronic low back pain, and news regarding APTA members uniting for payment advocacy. In orthopedic/musculoskeletal, 3 systematic reviews on C-section scars, sacroiliac joint dysfunction, and post-knee replacement swelling warrant attention.

items.title: Effectiveness of an individualised swimming and education programme for chronic low back pain (EduSwim): a randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT assessed an individualized swimming and education program for chronic low back pain compared to education alone, delivered via telehealth sessions over 8 weeks, with disability (RMDQ) as the primary outcome.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 为慢性非特异性腰痛的游泳干预提供了高质量证据。你可以依据这项研究，更有信心地将个体化游泳与教育方案纳入患者治疗计划。
items.titleZh: 个体化游泳与教育项目治疗慢性腰痛的有效性（EduSwim）：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验评估了为期 8 周、通过远程物理治疗提供的个体化游泳与教育项目，与单纯教育相比，对慢性腰痛患者的有效性，主要结局是残疾程度（RMDQ）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT provides high-quality evidence for swimming intervention in chronic non-specific low back pain. You can use this research to more confidently integrate individualized swimming and education programs into patient treatment plans.
items.limitation: 研究结果可能受远程物理治疗交付方式影响，外推到面诊环境需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: Results may be influenced by the telehealth delivery method, and generalization to in-person settings should be cautious.

items.title: From mechanics to mobilization: a biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars | BMC Women's Health
items.summary: A systematic review proposed a biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars, integrating strategies for both abdominal wall and uterine scars, addressing a lack of standardization in current approaches.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述为剖宫产相关瘢痕康复提供了一个基于生物力学信息的新框架，整合了浅层和深层瘢痕的康复策略。这提示你在评估和治疗剖宫产瘢痕时，需要超越传统表层处理，考虑更深层的生物力学影响。
items.titleZh: 从力学到动员：剖宫产相关瘢痕的生物力学康复框架：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述提出了一个基于生物力学信息的剖宫产相关瘢痕康复框架，整合了腹壁和子宫瘢痕的康复策略，以解决当前方法中缺乏标准化的不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review offers a new biomechanically-informed rehabilitation framework for cesarean-related scars, integrating strategies for both superficial and deep scars. This suggests that when evaluating and treating cesarean scars, you need to look beyond traditional superficial treatments and consider deeper biomechanical impacts.
items.limitation: 此为基于现有文献的框架性综述，缺乏统一的治疗方案和疗效对比数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a framework review based on existing literature, lacking standardized treatment protocols and comparative efficacy data.

items.title: A systematic review of current evidence on clinical outcomes of lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques in sacroiliac joint dysfunction.
items.summary: This systematic review evaluated the clinical efficacy of lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques for sacroiliac joint dysfunction, searching databases for studies published between January 2021 and December 2025.
items.curatedReason: 关于腰骶关节功能障碍的手法治疗，该系统综述应能帮你厘清腰椎翻滚和改良 SIMS 手法作为干预的最新证据，指导你的临床实践。
items.titleZh: 腰骶关节功能障碍中腰椎翻滚和改良 SIMS 手法治疗临床效果的系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 该系统综述评估了腰椎翻滚和改良 SIMS 手法治疗骶髂关节功能障碍的临床疗效，检索了 2021 年 1 月至 2025 年 12 月发表的相关研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review on manual therapy for sacroiliac joint dysfunction should clarify the latest evidence for lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation, guiding your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究仅纳入了 2021-2025 年间发表的文献，可能错过早期重要研究。
items.limitationEn: The review only included studies published between 2021 and 2025, potentially missing earlier significant research.

items.title: Kinesiotaping May Reduce Early Swelling After Knee Replacement, states study
items.summary: A randomized study of 136 patients found that adding kinesiotaping to standard rehabilitation after total knee arthroplasty reduced early postoperative knee swelling and led to a modest improvement in knee flexion.
items.curatedReason: 肌内效贴布（Kinesiotaping）辅助标准康复可能减少全膝关节置换术（TKA）早期肿胀并轻度改善屈膝活动度。这是一个低成本的辅助手段，但效应量有限，别期望它能彻底改变术后恢复，应作为短期支持性干预。
items.titleZh: 研究称肌内效贴布可减少膝关节置换术后早期肿胀
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 136 名患者的随机研究发现，在全膝关节置换术后标准康复中增加肌内效贴布治疗，可减少术后早期膝关节肿胀，并使膝关节屈曲度得到适度改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesiotaping as an adjunct to standard rehabilitation may reduce early swelling and modestly improve knee flexion after total knee arthroplasty (TKA). This is a low-cost adjunctive measure, but its effect size is limited; do not expect it to fundamentally alter postoperative recovery. It should be considered a short-term supportive intervention.
items.limitation: 研究强调需要进一步探究这些益处是否持续并改善以患者为中心的结局。
items.limitationEn: The study noted further research is needed to determine if these benefits persist and improve patient-centered outcomes.

items.title: Responsiveness of the Arabic version of the lower extremity functional scale in individuals with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders.
items.summary: This study examined the responsiveness of the Arabic version of the Lower Extremity Functional Scale (LEFS) in 74 participants with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders, finding its change scores correlated well with other outcome measures.
items.curatedReason: LEFS 阿拉伯语版在下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中显示出良好的响应性。如果你服务阿拉伯语患者，该量表是一个可靠的评估工具。
items.titleZh: 下肢功能量表阿拉伯语版在下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中的响应性。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究评估了下肢功能量表（LEFS）阿拉伯语版在 74 名下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中的响应性，发现其分数变化与其他结局测量值关联良好。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Arabic version of LEFS demonstrates good responsiveness in individuals with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders. If you serve Arabic-speaking patients, this scale is a reliable assessment tool.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，样本量中等，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study with a moderate sample size, and selection bias may be present.

items.title: Associations of physical activity, pain intensity, and quality of life with work ability among Nigerian nurses with mechanical low back pain: a cross-sectional survey | BMC Nursing
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey in Nigeria explored associations of physical activity, pain intensity, and quality of life with work ability among nurses experiencing mechanical low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 尼日利亚护士的机械性下腰痛与身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量之间的关联提示，在职业健康干预中应关注这些因素，以提高工作能力。这为发展针对职业人群的康复方案提供了背景信息。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚机械性下腰痛护士的身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量与工作能力的相关性：横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 一项在尼日利亚进行的横断面调查探讨了患有机械性下腰痛的护士中，身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量与工作能力之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Associations between physical activity, pain intensity, and quality of life with work ability in Nigerian nurses with mechanical low back pain suggest these factors should be addressed in occupational health interventions to improve work ability. This provides context for developing rehabilitation programs for occupational populations.
items.limitation: 作为一项横断面研究，无法确立身体活动、疼痛强度和生活质量与工作能力之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality between physical activity, pain intensity, quality of life, and work ability.

items.title: In adult patients with brainstem strokes, does dysphagia rehabilitation improve health-related outcomes compared to usual care for inpatients? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis with 12 studies and 443 participants explored the effectiveness of dysphagia rehabilitation in inpatients with brainstem stroke, categorizing interventions into traditional swallowing therapy or device inclusion.
items.curatedReason: 脑干卒中住院患者的吞咽康复，目前看来，传统吞咽疗法或结合器械干预都有一定效果。作为系统综述和荟萃分析，它总结了 12 项研究，为选择干预方案提供了当前最佳证据。
items.titleZh: 脑干卒中成人住院患者的吞咽康复是否能改善健康相关结局？一项系统综述与荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项包含 12 项研究、443 名参与者的系统综述与荟萃分析探讨了脑干卒中住院患者吞咽康复的有效性，将干预措施分为传统吞咽疗法或器械辅助。
items.curatedReasonEn: For dysphagia rehabilitation in inpatients with brainstem stroke, both traditional swallowing therapy and device-inclusive interventions appear beneficial. As a systematic review and meta-analysis, it consolidates 12 studies, offering the best current evidence for intervention selection.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能影响荟萃分析的整体结论。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies may affect the overall conclusions of the meta-analysis.

items.title: Effects of square-step exercise on fear of falling in older patients with ischemic stroke: a cluster randomized controlled trial | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: A cluster randomized controlled trial involving 62 older ischemic stroke patients found that square-step exercise improved fall fear, balance, and activities of daily living, and reduced fall risk.
items.curatedReason: 方步运动（square-step exercise）能有效降低老年缺血性卒中患者的跌倒恐惧。这个 RCT 证实了特定运动干预在改善心理结局方面的潜力，可作为神经康复中预防跌倒的补充手段。
items.titleZh: 方步运动对老年缺血性卒中患者跌倒恐惧的影响：一项集群随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 62 名老年缺血性卒中患者的集群随机对照试验发现，方步运动改善了跌倒恐惧、平衡能力和日常生活活动，并降低了跌倒风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Square-step exercise effectively reduces fear of falling in older patients with ischemic stroke. This RCT confirms the potential of specific exercise interventions in improving psychological outcomes and can be used as an adjunct to fall prevention in neurological rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（62 例），可能限制了结果的普遍性，且未报告长期随访数据。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (62 patients) may limit generalizability, and long-term follow-up data were not reported.

items.title: γ-transcranial alternating current stimulation improves upper-limb motor function in stroke patients and modulates oscillatory imbalance: a pilot randomized controlled trial | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A pilot randomized controlled trial demonstrated that γ-transcranial alternating current stimulation improved upper-limb motor function in stroke patients and modulated oscillatory imbalance.
items.curatedReason: 一项小型 RCT 显示，γ-经颅交流电刺激 (γ-tACS) 可改善卒中患者的上肢运动功能并调节皮层振荡失衡。这提示 tACS 可能成为神经调控干预的新方向，但鉴于样本量小，短期内别急于推广。
items.titleZh: γ-经颅交流电刺激改善卒中患者上肢运动功能并调节振荡失衡：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项试点随机对照试验显示，γ-经颅交流电刺激改善了卒中患者的上肢运动功能并调节了振荡失衡。
items.curatedReasonEn: A small RCT suggests that γ-transcranial alternating current stimulation (γ-tACS) may improve upper-limb motor function and modulate oscillatory imbalance in stroke patients. This indicates tACS could be a new direction for neuro-modulation interventions, but given the small sample size, do not rush to widespread adoption.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的试点 RCT，样本量小，需要更大规模的研究来验证其疗效和长期效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot RCT with a small sample size, requiring larger studies to validate its efficacy and long-term effects.

items.title: Correlation of Motor-Task Related Brain Activation Changes With Motor Performance Changes Induced by Constraint-Induced Therapy After Stroke.
items.summary: This study evaluated motor-task related brain activation changes and their relationship to functional recovery in 42 hemiparetic stroke participants undergoing CIMT during subacute and chronic periods, using fMRI and WMFT.
items.curatedReason: CIMT 对卒中偏瘫患者的疗效我们已知晓，但这项观察研究进一步提示，其效果可能与特定的脑激活模式改变有关。虽然是小样本（42 人）观察研究，但为理解 CIMT 的作用机制提供了神经影像学线索。
items.titleZh: 卒中后限制性运动疗法（CIMT）引起的运动任务相关脑激活变化与运动表现变化的关联。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究评估了 42 名偏瘫卒中患者在亚急性期和慢性期接受 CIMT 治疗期间，运动任务相关脑激活变化与功能恢复的关联，使用了 fMRI 和 WMFT 进行评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: While CIMT's efficacy for hemiparetic stroke patients is established, this observational study suggests its benefits may correlate with specific changes in brain activation patterns. Though a small-sample (42 participants) observational study, it offers neuroimaging clues to the mechanisms underpinning CIMT.
items.limitation: 研究的 fMRI 分析结果可能存在多重比较问题，且样本量相对较小。
items.limitationEn: The fMRI analysis results may have multiple comparison issues, and the sample size is relatively small.

items.title: Enhancing dynamic postural stability during gait in Parkinson's disease with textured insoles and auditory cue training: a randomized controlled trial study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=27) in Parkinson's disease patients (Hoehn & Yahr stages 2.5-3) found that combining textured insoles with auditory cueing provided complementary benefits for enhancing dynamic postural stability during gait compared to textured insoles alone or progressive walking training.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验提示，在帕金森病患者步态训练中结合有纹理鞋垫和听觉提示可能比单独使用有纹理鞋垫或步行训练更能改善动态姿势稳定性。这为帕金森患者的平衡和步态干预提供了新的联合方案思路。
items.titleZh: 纹理鞋垫与听觉提示训练联合增强帕金森病患者步态动态姿势稳定性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对帕金森病（Hoehn & Yahr 2.5-3 期）患者的随机对照试验（n=27）发现，与单独使用纹理鞋垫或渐进式步行训练相比，结合纹理鞋垫和听觉提示能更好地增强步态期间的动态姿势稳定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that combining textured insoles with auditory cues during gait training for Parkinson's disease patients may improve dynamic postural stability more than textured insoles or walking training alone. This offers new insights for combined interventions for balance and gait in Parkinson's patients.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（27 例），且为单中心研究，结果的普适性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size (27 participants) and was single-center, which may limit the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Bypass neural interfaces for paralysis: clinical translation, challenges and future directions | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A review explored the clinical translation, challenges, and future directions of bypass neural interfaces for paralysis, which re-establish functional communication across disrupted neural pathways.
items.curatedReason: 旁路神经接口技术在瘫痪康复中的临床转化、挑战和未来方向的综述，对理解先进神经工程在神经康复中的潜力很有价值。它展示了未来 PT 实践与高科技结合的可能性。
items.titleZh: 瘫痪旁路神经接口：临床转化、挑战与未来方向
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了旁路神经接口用于瘫痪的临床转化、挑战和未来方向，这些接口重建了受损神经通路的功能性交流。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review of bypass neural interfaces for paralysis, covering clinical translation, challenges, and future directions, is valuable for understanding the potential of advanced neuroengineering in neurological rehabilitation. It demonstrates the future possibilities of PT practice integrating with high technology.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要关注技术进展和潜力，缺乏具体临床疗效的量化数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review focused on technological advancements and potential, lacking quantitative data on specific clinical efficacy.

items.title: The effect of an eight-week FIFA 11+ program on the landing error scoring system following functional fatigue in adolescent female soccer players with dynamic knee valgus | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: An eight-week FIFA 11+ program significantly improved the Landing Error Scoring System (LESS) following functional fatigue in adolescent female soccer players with dynamic knee valgus.
items.curatedReason: FIFA 11+ 方案可改善青少年女性足球运动员在功能性疲劳后的着陆错误评分系统（LESS），这对于降低 ACL 损伤风险至关重要。将此方案纳入青少年女性运动员的训练常规，有助于提高预防效果。
items.titleZh: 八周 FIFA 11+ 方案对青少年女性足球运动员动态膝外翻功能性疲劳后着陆错误评分系统的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，为期八周的 FIFA 11+ 方案显著改善了青少年女性足球运动员在动态膝外翻和功能性疲劳后的着陆错误评分系统（LESS）表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: The FIFA 11+ program can improve the Landing Error Scoring System (LESS) after functional fatigue in adolescent female soccer players, which is crucial for reducing ACL injury risk. Incorporating this program into adolescent female athletes' training routines can enhance prevention effectiveness.
items.limitation: 研究虽然是随机对照试验，但只评估了 8 周干预的短期效果，缺乏长期随访数据来确认 ACL 损伤发生率的实际降低。
items.limitationEn: Although a randomized controlled trial, the study only evaluated the short-term effects of an 8-week intervention, lacking long-term follow-up data to confirm an actual reduction in ACL injury incidence.

items.title: Diagnostic accuracy of biodex balance system stability indices under single- and dual-task conditions in individuals with chronic ankle instability | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A research study investigated the diagnostic accuracy of Biodex balance system stability indices under single- and dual-task conditions in individuals with chronic ankle instability.
items.curatedReason: Biodex 平衡系统在单任务和双任务条件下，对慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）患者的诊断准确性研究，有助于你更好地评估 CAI 患者的平衡缺陷，尤其是在动态和认知负荷下的表现。这能提升临床评估的精细度。
items.titleZh: Biodex 平衡系统稳定性指标在慢性踝关节不稳患者单任务和双任务条件下的诊断准确性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究调查了 Biodex 平衡系统稳定性指标在单任务和双任务条件下，对慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）患者的诊断准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Research on the diagnostic accuracy of Biodex balance system stability indices under single- and dual-task conditions for chronic ankle instability (CAI) helps you better assess balance deficits in CAI patients, especially under dynamic and cognitive loads. This can enhance the precision of clinical evaluation.
items.limitation: 本研究是一项观察性研究，评估的是诊断准确性，而非干预效果，且受试者样本量有限。
items.limitationEn: This observational study assessed diagnostic accuracy, not intervention effectiveness, and had a limited sample size.

items.title: Distinct Movement-Related Cortical Control Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury: A Scoping Review | Sports Medicine - Open
items.summary: A scoping review synthesized evidence on distinct brain activity and its impact on motor performance during motor tasks in anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) patients.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤后的运动功能障碍，可能不只是关节本身的问题。这份综述提示，大脑皮层活动的变化也扮演了角色，这提醒你在康复时，别只盯着外周，神经层面的干预或许也是重要一环。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带损伤后独特的运动相关皮层控制：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述综合了关于前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤患者在运动任务期间独特的脑活动及其对运动表现影响的证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: Motor dysfunction after ACL injury might not solely be a joint issue. This review suggests altered brain activity also plays a role, reminding you not to focus solely on peripheral issues during rehabilitation; neural interventions may be an important component.
items.limitation: 这是一项范围综述，主要侧重于文献的识别和总结，而非对证据的质量进行严格评估或进行荟萃分析。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, primarily focused on identifying and summarizing literature, rather than rigorously assessing evidence quality or conducting meta-analysis.

items.title: Prevalence and risk factors of medial meniscal ramp lesions in patients undergoing primary anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction at a tertiary center | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: A research study at a tertiary center investigated the prevalence and risk factors of medial meniscal ramp lesions in patients undergoing primary anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 在原发性 ACL 重建术患者中，内侧半月板斜坡损伤的患病率不容忽视。这项观察研究提醒你，评估 ACL 损伤患者时，务必高度警惕这种并发损伤，早期诊断和处理至关重要。
items.titleZh: 三级中心初次前交叉韧带重建患者内侧半月板斜坡损伤的患病率和风险因素
items.summaryZh: 一项在三级中心进行的研究调查了接受初次前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术患者中，内侧半月板斜坡损伤的患病率和风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: The prevalence of medial meniscal ramp lesions in primary ACL reconstruction patients is significant. This observational study warns you to be highly vigilant for this concomitant injury when evaluating ACL injury patients; early diagnosis and management are crucial.
items.limitation: 这是一项在单一三级中心进行的研究，其结果在不同医疗环境和人群中的普适性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: This study was conducted at a single tertiary center, so the generalizability of its findings to different clinical settings and populations may be limited.

items.title: Outcome indicators and effectiveness of nutrition education for athletes: a systematic review | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A systematic review assessed outcome indicators and the effectiveness of nutrition education for athletes, aiming to improve health, nutritional status, and support athletic sustainability.
items.curatedReason: 为运动员提供营养教育，关键在于知道什么有效。这项系统综述为你指明了方向：了解哪些营养教育方法能真正改善健康和运动表现，并学会如何评估其效果，以设计更科学的跨学科支持。
items.titleZh: 运动员营养教育的结局指标和有效性：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述评估了运动员营养教育的结局指标和有效性，旨在改善健康、营养状况并支持运动的可持续性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review evaluates the effectiveness and outcome indicators of nutrition education for athletes, which is crucial for you to understand what interventions are effective and how to measure their success when providing nutrition counseling and education to athletes. This helps you design more effective interdisciplinary support programs.
items.limitation: 作为系统综述，其结论受限于纳入研究的质量和异质性，可能无法给出统一的、强有力的干预建议。
items.limitationEn: As a systematic review, its conclusions are limited by the quality and heterogeneity of included studies, potentially preventing uniform, strong intervention recommendations.

items.title: Eccentric cycling for ACL-R rehabilitation: A masterclass.
items.summary: This masterclass discusses the increasing use of eccentric training in ACL-R rehabilitation, noting its potential benefits for quadriceps strength and return-to-sport performance, while emphasizing gradual and individualized implementation.
items.curatedReason: 关于 ACL 重建术后离心训练的实施，这篇综述提醒你关注早期离心训练的潜在益处。在考虑将其纳入康复计划时，要注重个体化和循序渐进。
items.titleZh: ACL 重建术后康复中的离心骑行：专家课程。
items.summaryZh: 这篇专家课程讨论了离心训练在 ACL 重建术后康复中日益增长的应用，指出其对股四头肌力量和重返运动表现的潜在益处，同时强调应循序渐进和个体化实施。
items.curatedReasonEn: Regarding the implementation of eccentric training after ACL reconstruction, this review highlights the potential benefits of early eccentric training. When considering incorporating it into rehabilitation, focus on individualization and gradual progression.
items.limitation: 本文性质更偏向专家观点或述评，缺乏系统性证据整合。
items.limitationEn: This article is more akin to an expert opinion or commentary, lacking systematic evidence integration.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Action observation therapy in pediatric cerebral palsy: an fNIRS-based ...
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial investigated the effects of action observation therapy (AOT) on cortical responses and balance in pediatric cerebral palsy patients using fNIRS, finding improvements in balance.
items.curatedReason: 在小儿脑瘫患者的康复中，动作观察疗法（AOT）不只改善平衡，这项 RCT 还用 fNIRS 证实了它能调节皮层反应。这支持了 AOT 作为一种非侵入性神经康复手段，并可能为你开辟新的干预思路。
items.titleZh: 小儿脑瘫动作观察疗法：基于 fNNIRS 的皮层反应和平衡研究——一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验利用 fNIRS 研究了动作观察疗法（AOT）对小儿脑瘫患者皮层反应和平衡的影响，发现平衡有所改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: In pediatric cerebral palsy rehabilitation, Action Observation Therapy (AOT) doesn't just improve balance; this RCT, using fNIRS, confirms it also modulates cortical responses. This supports AOT as a non-invasive neurorehabilitation tool and may open new avenues for intervention.
items.limitation: 这项 RCT 是基于 fNIRS 的试点研究，样本量和随访时间有限，需要更大规模的研究来确证其长期临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This fNIRS-based pilot RCT has a limited sample size and follow-up period, and larger studies are needed to confirm its long-term clinical efficacy.

items.title: Biomechanical effects of powered knee orthoses and articulated ankle-foot orthoses in people with diparetic cerebral palsy: a pilot study | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A pilot study investigated the biomechanical effects of powered knee orthoses and articulated ankle-foot orthoses in people with diparetic cerebral palsy, who often exhibit gait impairments like excessive knee flexion and ankle dorsiflexion.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步研究揭示了动力膝关节矫形器和踝足矫形器（AFO）在双瘫型脑瘫患者中的生物力学效应。这为选择合适的辅助装置提供了初步证据，有助于你根据个体步态障碍特点定制矫形器方案。
items.titleZh: 动力膝关节矫形器和踝足矫形器对双瘫型脑瘫患者的生物力学效应：一项试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项试点研究调查了动力膝关节矫形器和踝足矫形器对双瘫型脑瘫患者的生物力学效应，这些患者常表现出膝关节过度屈曲和踝关节背屈过大等步态障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study reveals the biomechanical effects of powered knee orthoses and articulated ankle-foot orthoses (AFOs) in individuals with diparetic cerebral palsy. This provides preliminary evidence for selecting appropriate assistive devices, helping you customize orthosis plans based on individual gait impairment characteristics.
items.limitation: 这是一项试点研究，样本量小，且只报告了短期的生物力学效应，缺乏长期临床功能改善的证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot study with a small sample size, reporting only short-term biomechanical effects and lacking evidence of long-term clinical functional improvement.

items.title: Can slow and (un)steady still win the race? A narrative review of developmental gait characteristics and clinical implications in children born preterm | European Journal of Pediatrics
items.summary: A narrative review discussed developmental gait characteristics and their clinical implications in children born preterm, highlighting the integration of neuromuscular maturation, postural control, and sensorimotor coordination in independent walking.
items.curatedReason: 这篇叙述性综述探讨了早产儿发育性步态特征及其临床意义，为理解早产儿步态异常的复杂性提供了深入视角。这有助于你评估和干预早产儿的运动发育迟缓，识别潜在的步态问题。
items.titleZh: 慢而（不）稳也能赢？早产儿发育性步态特征及临床意义叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇叙述性综述讨论了早产儿的发育性步态特征及其临床意义，强调了神经肌肉成熟、姿势控制和感觉运动协调在独立行走中的整合。
items.curatedReasonEn: Gait development in preterm children is unique and complex. This review provides a comprehensive framework for understanding preterm gait characteristics, helping you more accurately assess and intervene in their motor development issues, and avoid misinterpreting normal developmental variations as pathology.
items.limitation: 这是一篇叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且未能提供量化的综合证据或明确的干预指南。
items.limitationEn: This narrative review may be subject to selection bias and does not provide quantified composite evidence or clear intervention guidelines.

items.title: Age- and sex-specific percentile curves for gross and fine motor skills in early childhood: an analysis from the SUNRISE International Study | European Journal of Pediatrics
items.summary: An analysis from the SUNRISE International Study provided age- and sex-specific percentile curves for gross and fine motor skills in early childhood, addressing the need for diverse reference data beyond high-income countries.
items.curatedReason: 别再只用高收入国家的参考数据来评估儿童发育了。这项 SUNRISE 国际研究提供了更具普适性的年龄和性别特异性粗大及精细运动技能百分位数曲线，这批新数据对你评估不同文化背景下儿童的运动发育至关重要。
items.titleZh: 早期儿童粗大和精细运动技能的年龄和性别特异性百分位数曲线：SUNRISE 国际研究分析
items.summaryZh: 一项来自 SUNRISE 国际研究的分析提供了早期儿童粗大和精细运动技能的年龄和性别特异性百分位数曲线，旨在满足高收入国家以外多样化参考数据的需求。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stop relying solely on high-income country reference data for child development. This SUNRISE International Study provides more universally applicable age- and sex-specific percentile curves for gross and fine motor skills. These new data are crucial for you to assess motor development in children from diverse cultural backgrounds.
items.limitation: 研究虽是大样本，但仍是横断面数据，不能完全替代纵向追踪研究来反映个体发育轨迹。
items.limitationEn: Although a large sample, the study provides cross-sectional data, which cannot fully replace longitudinal studies in reflecting individual developmental trajectories.

items.title: Handgrip and leg strength and risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged ≥ 80 years: a prospective HUNT study | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: A prospective HUNT study found that handgrip and leg strength were associated with the risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged 80 years and older.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性 HUNT 研究发现，80 岁及以上老年人的握力和腿部力量与严重跌倒损伤风险相关。这强调了你作为物理治疗师，在对极高龄患者进行跌倒风险评估时，应高度关注这些基础力量指标。
items.titleZh: 80 岁及以上成年人握力和腿部力量与严重跌倒损伤风险：一项前瞻性 HUNT 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性 HUNT 研究发现，80 岁及以上成年人的握力和腿部力量与严重跌倒损伤风险相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective HUNT study found that handgrip and leg strength are associated with the risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged 80 years and older. This emphasizes that as a physical therapist, you should pay close attention to these basic strength indicators when assessing fall risk in very elderly patients.
items.limitation: 研究仅建立了力量与跌倒损伤风险的关联性，无法确立因果关系，也未直接评估干预措施的效果。
items.limitationEn: The study only established an association between strength and fall injury risk, without establishing causality or directly evaluating intervention effectiveness.

items.title: Characterization of physical health variables across fall risk appraisal groups: a cross-sectional study | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: A cross-sectional study characterized physical health variables across different fall risk appraisal groups, aiming to understand factors related to fall risk in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 不同跌倒风险评估组的老年人，其身体健康变量特征各不相同。这项横断面研究提醒你，在制定跌倒预防策略时，不能一概而论，应根据患者具体的风险评估结果，更精细地匹配干预措施。
items.titleZh: 不同跌倒风险评估组身体健康变量的特征：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究描述了不同跌倒风险评估组的身体健康变量特征，旨在了解老年人跌倒风险相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Older adults in different fall risk appraisal groups exhibit distinct physical health variable characteristics. This cross-sectional study reminds you that fall prevention strategies should not be one-size-fits-all; instead, interventions must be more precisely tailored to each patient's specific risk assessment.
items.limitation: 作为横断面研究，本研究仅描述了跌倒风险组间的变量差异，无法推断因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it only describes variable differences between fall risk groups and cannot infer causality.

items.title: Low-load blood flow restriction training vs high-load resistance training for sarcopenia in older adults: a literature review | Sport Sciences for Health
items.summary: A literature review compared low-load blood flow restriction training (BFRT) with high-load resistance training for sarcopenia in older adults, addressing the challenge of muscle strength and mass maintenance.
items.curatedReason: 对于无法承受高负荷的老年肌少症患者，BFRT 是一个有前景的替代方案，能有效维持肌肉力量和质量。在临床实践中，当你遇到这类患者时，可以考虑将低负荷 BFRT 纳入治疗计划。
items.titleZh: 低负荷血流限制训练与高负荷阻力训练治疗老年肌少症：一项文献综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇文献综述比较了低负荷血流限制训练（BFRT）与高负荷阻力训练在老年肌少症患者中的应用，旨在解决肌肉力量和质量维持的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: For older adults with sarcopenia who cannot tolerate high-load resistance training, BFRT presents a promising alternative for maintaining muscle strength and mass. You should consider integrating low-load BFRT into treatment plans for these patients when appropriate.
items.limitation: 作为文献综述，其结论的强度受限于所纳入研究的质量和异质性，缺乏荟萃分析的量化结果。
items.limitationEn: As a literature review, the strength of its conclusions is limited by the quality and heterogeneity of the included studies, lacking quantitative results from a meta-analysis.

items.title: APTA Members Unite to Advance Payment Advocacy Via New SPARC Forum and Pledge
items.summary: APTA members are uniting to advance payment advocacy through the newly formed SPARC Forum and a pledge to support these efforts.
items.curatedReason: APTA 成立新论坛 SPARC，旨在推进支付倡导。这将直接影响你在美国市场上的物理治疗报销环境和执业收入，务必关注其后续动向。
items.titleZh: APTA 成员通过新 SPARC 论坛和承诺团结起来推动支付倡导。
items.summaryZh: APTA 成员正通过新成立的 SPARC 论坛及相关承诺，共同推进支付倡导工作。
items.curatedReasonEn: APTA has launched SPARC, a new forum to advance payment advocacy. This will directly impact the physical therapy reimbursement environment and your practice revenue in the US market, so be sure to monitor its developments.

flashes.title: Single-session pelvic prehabilitation improves continence recovery after robot-assisted radical prostatectomy: a prospective comparative study | Journal of Robotic Surgery
flashes.titleZh: 单次盆底术前康复训练可改善机器人辅助前列腺癌根治术后的控尿功能恢复：一项前瞻性比较研究

flashes.title: The evaluation of the tests that can predict de novo stress urinary incontinence after advanced pelvic organ prolapse surgery: a prospective study | BMC Women's Health
flashes.titleZh: 预测晚期盆腔器官脱垂手术后新发压力性尿失禁测试的评估：一项前瞻性研究

flashes.title: Predictors of discharge destination of stroke patients from inpatient rehabilitation center, including difficult discharge cases | Egyptian Rheumatology and Rehabilitation
flashes.titleZh: 卒中患者出院目的地预测因素，包括困难出院病例

flashes.title: Authors' reply to: letter to the editor: occupational therapy at home E-rehabilitation (OTHER): a feasibility study of post-stroke intervention for transition to home.
flashes.titleZh: 作者回复：关于“居家职业治疗电子康复（OTHER）——卒中后居家过渡可行性研究”的致编辑信

flashes.title: Hamstring fascicle behavior during leg curl exercises performed at varying knee joint angles and loading intensities in individuals with a history of unilateral hamstring injury: a randomized cross-over design study
flashes.titleZh: 单侧腘绳肌损伤史患者在不同膝关节角度和负荷强度下进行腿弯举时腘绳肌筋束行为的研究：一项随机交叉设计研究
